title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: microcode_ctl bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for microcode_ctl is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The microcode_ctl packages provide microcode updates for Intel and AMD processors.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHEL 8] Update Intel CPU microcode to the latest version (JIRA:RHEL-110097)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: [RHEL 8] Update Intel CPU microcode to the latest version

full_text:
An update for microcode_ctl is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The microcode_ctl packages provide microcode updates for Intel and AMD processors.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHEL 8] Update Intel CPU microcode to the latest version (JIRA:RHEL-110097)
